hero.title: Press Kit
hero.subtitle: Brand resources, logos, and visual guidelines for Catalisa.

boilerplate.title: About Catalisa
boilerplate.description: Official company description for press use. Click to copy.
boilerplate.text: Catalisa is a composable B2B platform with 60+ ready-made building blocks for automating customer communication, integrations, and workflows. From fintech to healthcare, companies use Catalisa to ship in days what used to take months of internal development.

colors.title: Brand Colors
colors.description: Click any color to copy the hex code.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Catalisa uses Inter as its primary typeface across all touchpoints.
typography.sample: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

logos.title: Logos
logos.description: The Catalisa logo is available in three color variants. Prefer SVG for digital use.

icons.title: Icons
icons.description: The brand icon in different styles for apps, favicons, and social media.

guidelines.title: Usage Guidelines
guidelines.description: Follow these rules to maintain Catalisa brand consistency.

do.title: Do
items: Use the white version on dark backgrounds
Use the color or dark version on light backgrounds
Keep minimum clear space (dot height around the logo)
Minimum size: 80px width for logo, 16px for icon
Always keep the yellow dot visible
Prefer SVG for digital, PNG for documents

dont.title: Don't
items: Don't distort or rotate the logo
Don't change the yellow dot color
Don't add shadows, gradients, or effects
Don't alter the proportion between text and dot
Don't use the logo on backgrounds that compromise readability

contact.title: Press Contact
contact.description: For press inquiries, partnerships, or brand usage requests.

downloadAll.label: Download All Assets
downloadAll.description: Get the complete package with all SVG and PNG brand files.
